summary: Iteration 124: Frontend-only testing for pillar-specific MiraContextPanel with voice capabilities (Pulse integration). All 10 features tested across Advisory, Emergency, and Care pages.

backend_issues.note: Backend testing skipped as per request - frontend only testing

issues: Floating contact button (z-index 9999) overlaps MiraContextPanel on mobile, making Pulse/Voice buttons hard to access
User expected pink gradient header for Care pillar, but implementation uses green/emerald gradient (from-green-500 to-emerald-500). This is as per pillarConfig in MiraContextPanel.jsx

action_items: Consider adjusting z-index of MiraContextPanel on mobile to be above floating contact button, or reposition floating contact to not overlap
critical_code_review_comments: MiraContextPanel correctly implements voice capabilities with speakText(), toggleListening(), getTimeGreeting() functions
Pulse button (data-testid='mira-panel-pulse-btn') visible and functional on all pillar pages
Voice toggle button (data-testid='mira-panel-voice-toggle') toggles between ON/OFF states correctly
Mic button (data-testid='mira-panel-mic-btn') appears in chat input when chat is opened
Pillar-specific colors working: Advisory=purple, Emergency=red, Care=green
Pillar-specific quick prompts loading correctly from API
'Plan My {Pillar}' button shows correct pillar name on each page
context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraContextPanel voice integration fully functional on desktop. Mobile has z-index overlap issue with floating contact button. Voice features (Web Speech API) work in browsers that support it.

TEST_1_Advisory_MiraContextPanel.details: MiraContextPanel appears on /advisory page with purple gradient header (from-purple-500 to-violet-600)

TEST_2_Emergency_MiraContextPanel.details: MiraContextPanel appears on /emergency page with red gradient header (from-red-500 to-rose-600)

TEST_3_Care_MiraContextPanel.details: MiraContextPanel appears on /care page with green gradient header (from-green-500 to-emerald-500)

TEST_4_Pulse_Button_Visibility.details: Pulse button visible in Mira panel header on all pillar pages

TEST_5_Voice_Toggle_Button.details: Voice toggle button visible and toggles between ON (bg-white/20) and OFF (bg-white/10) states

TEST_6_Ask_Mira_Button.details: 'Ask Mira' button opens chat interface on all pillar pages

TEST_7_Plan_My_Advisory_Button.details: 'Plan My Advisory' button appears on advisory pillar

TEST_8_Plan_My_Emergency_Button.details: 'Plan My Emergency' button appears on emergency pillar

TEST_9_Advisory_Quick_Prompts.details: Advisory pillar shows quick prompts: 'Health Advice', 'Nutrition Guide', 'Behavior Tips'

TEST_10_Emergency_Quick_Prompts.details: Emergency pillar shows quick prompts: 'Emergency Vet', 'Lost Pet', 'Poison Help'

voice_features_verified.pulse_button: Clicking Pulse opens chat in listening mode with cyan animated mic button
voice_features_verified.voice_toggle: Toggles voice responses ON/OFF, changes icon from Volume2 to VolumeX
voice_features_verified.mic_button_in_chat: Inline mic button appears in chat input field
voice_features_verified.listening_state: Input placeholder changes to 'Listening...' when voice active
voice_features_verified.text_to_speech: Uses SpeechSynthesis API for speaking responses
